flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pellissippi State Community College fell 82% between 2006 and 2009 (53.5% → 9.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pellissippi State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Pellissippi State Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (48.9% → 58.2%).
